title: Senior Backend Engineer — Search & Ranking (Founding Team)
description: Own the intelligence layer of a Series A talent-intelligence product: the retrieval, ranking, and matching backend that decides what recruiters and candidates see. You will ship a v2 ranking system (hybrid retrieval + LLM/learning-to-rank reranking), stand up offline+online evaluation, and drive long-term candidate-JD matching architecture at scale. This role writes production code; strong Python and rigorous ranking evaluation are non-negotiable.

role_dna.role_summary: A founding-team senior backend engineer who owns production retrieval and ranking systems — embeddings-based and hybrid search over a vector/keyword store, a learning-to-rank or LLM reranker, and rigorous NDCG/MRR offline plus online A/B evaluation — while staying scrappy enough to ship a working ranker in a week. Tilts toward shipper over researcher; strong Python and production deployment experience are mandatory.
culture: moves fast, breaks internal assumptions not user-facing systems
red_flags: pure research background without production deployment
AI experience limited to <12 months of LangChain-on-OpenAI
senior who hasn't shipped production code in 18+ months
primary expertise in CV/speech/robotics without NLP/IR exposure
low platform availability (inactive, low recruiter response rate)
role_dna.growth_path: Grows the AI engineering org from 4 to 12 engineers; mentors new hires and drives long-term matching architecture.

metadata.notes: Materiality is JD-meaning over JD-keywords; behavioural availability signals down-weight perfect-on-paper-but-absent candidates.
